title: Junior Frontend Developer at Byju's International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Byju's International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Byju's International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Byju's International Enterprises:
Byju's International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's International Enterprises!
